ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "w_pct" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "min" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "ot_wins" INTEGER /* Number of overtime wins */,
  "ot_losses" INTEGER /* Number of overtime losses */,
  "ppg" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "opp_ppg" REAL /* Opponent points per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponent_performance" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "opp_fgm" REAL /* Opponent field goals made */,
  "opp_fga" REAL /* Opponent field goals attempted */,
  "opp_fg_pct" REAL /* Opponent field goal percentage */,
  "opp_fg3m" REAL /* Opponent three-point field goals made */,
  "opp_fg3a" REAL /* Opponent three-point field goals attempted */,
  "opp_fg3_pct" REAL /* Opponent three-point field goal percentage */,
  "opp_ftm" REAL /* Opponent free throws made */,
  "opp_fta" REAL /* Opponent free throws attempted */,
  "opp_ft_pct" REAL /* Opponent free throw percentage */,
  "opp_oreb" REAL /* Opponent offensive rebounds */,
  "opp_dreb" REAL /* Opponent defensive rebounds */,
  "opp_reb" REAL /* Opponent total rebounds */,
  "opp_ast" REAL /* Opponent assists */,
  "opp_tov" REAL /* Opponent turnovers */,
  "opp_stl" REAL /* Opponent steals */,
  "opp_blk" REAL /* Opponent blocks */,
  "opp_blka" REAL /* Opponent blocked attempts */,
  "opp_pf" REAL /* Opponent personal fouls */,
  "opp_pfd" REAL /* Opponent personal fouls drawn */,
  "opp_pts" REAL /* Opponent points scored */,
  "opp_fga_2pt" REAL /* Opponent two-point field goals attempted */,
  "opp_fga_3pt" REAL /* Opponent three-point field goals attempted */,
  "opp_fgm_2pt" REAL /* Opponent two-point field goals made */,
  "opp_fgm_3pt" REAL /* Opponent three-point field goals made */,
  "opp_fg3a_rate" REAL /* Opponent three-point field goal attempt rate */,
  "opp_ftr" REAL /* Opponent free throw rate */,
  "opp_orb_pct" REAL /* Opponent offensive rebound percentage */,
  "opp_drb_pct" REAL /* Opponent defensive rebound percentage */,
  "opp_tov_pct" REAL /* Opponent turnover percentage */,
  "opp_drives" REAL /* Opponent drives per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plus_minus" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "ppg_diff" REAL /* Points per game difference */,
  "rpg_diff" REAL /* Rebounds per game difference */,
  "apg_diff" REAL /* Assists per game difference */,
  "spg_diff" REAL /* Steals per game difference */,
  "bpg_diff" REAL /* Blocks per game difference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "gp_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for games played */,
  "w_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for wins */,
  "l_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for losses */,
  "w_pct_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for win percentage */,
  "min_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for average minutes played per game */,
  "opp_fgm_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent field goals made */,
  "opp_fga_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent field goals attempted */,
  "opp_fg_pct_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent field goal percentage */,
  "opp_fg3m_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent three-point field goals made */,
  "opp_fg3a_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent three-point field goals attempted */,
  "opp_fg3_pct_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent three-point field goal percentage */,
  "opp_ftm_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent free throws made */,
  "opp_fta_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent free throws attempted */,
  "opp_ft_pct_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent free throw percentage */,
  "opp_oreb_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent offensive rebounds */,
  "opp_dreb_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent defensive rebounds */,
  "opp_reb_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent total rebounds */,
  "opp_ast_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent assists */,
  "opp_tov_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent turnovers */,
  "opp_stl_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent steals */,
  "opp_blk_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent blocks */,
  "opp_blka_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent blocked attempts */,
  "opp_pf_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent personal fouls */,
  "opp_pfd_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent personal fouls drawn */,
  "opp_pts_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent points scored */,
  "plus_minus_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for plus-minus rating */,
  "ppg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for points per game */,
  "opp_ppg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for opponent points per game */,
  "ppg_diff_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for points per game difference */,
  "rpg_diff_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for rebounds per game difference */,
  "apg_diff_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for assists per game difference */,
  "spg_diff_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for steals per game difference */,
  "bpg_diff_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for blocks per game difference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, analyst, coach) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the team data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the team data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_metrics" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  "team_defensive_rating" REAL /* Team defensive rating */,
  "team_offensive_rating" REAL /* Team offensive rating */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team */,
  "pace_factor" REAL /* Pace factor */,
  "efg_pct" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "tov_pct" REAL /* Turnover percentage */,
  "orb_pct" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage */,
  "ft_rate" REAL /* Free throw rate */,
  "off_rtg" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "def_rtg" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., home, away) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* JSON array of quarter scores */,
  "overtime_scores" TEXT /* JSON array of overtime scores */,
  "point_diff" INTEGER /* Point difference between the team and the opponent */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "pts" REAL /* Points scored */,
  "reb" REAL /* Rebounds */,
  "ast" REAL /* Assists */,
  "stl" REAL /* Steals */,
  "blk" REAL /* Blocks */,
  "fgm" REAL /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" REAL /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "fg3m" REAL /* Three-point field goals made */,
  "fg3a" REAL /* Three-point field goals attempted */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "ftm" REAL /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" REAL /* Free throws attempted */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "orb" REAL /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "drb" REAL /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "tov" REAL /* Turnovers */,
  "pf" REAL /* Personal fouls */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus-minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_comments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
